markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content quality and explore 2026 strategic initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Quality:** Two articles need rewrites due to off-brief content and fuzzy framing. Intros/closers are formulaic; growthx.ai will update guidelines and test new styles to add variety.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [**2026 Strategy:** Relay is exploring two new content streams: 1) hyper-specialized editorial content for specific verticals (e.g., skilled trades) and 2) programmatic SEO to expand the Help Center for LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**Reporting:** An incomplete December report will be delivered by Dec 22, as the usual last-week-of-the-month timing falls during the holiday break.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [**Metrics:** All key metrics (impressions, session growth, LLM visibility) are trending positively. LLM traffic volatility is normal, caused by small sample sizes and model updates.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality & Style

  - [**Problem:** Two articles are off-brief and require rewrites.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
      - [**"Credit Unions vs. Banks vs. Fintechs":** Final draft focused only on credit unions, missing the approved comparison scope.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [**"Cash Flow":** Framing was fuzzy, discussing two topics simultaneously without clear focus.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Problem:** Intros and closers are formulaic, using repetitive patterns.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
      - [**Intros:** Often use the "open your bank app on Monday morning" hook.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
      - [**Closers:** Often use the "start by doing X today... tomorrow, you'll see Y" structure.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=398.0)
      - [**Goal:** Add variety while retaining the effective situational hook style.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [**Action:** growthx.ai will update writing guidelines and test new intro/closer styles.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

### 2026 Strategic Planning

  - [**Relay's Goal:** Increase content volume and explore new formats for 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [**Initiative 1: Hyper-Specialized Editorial Content**](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Concept:** Create deep-dive articles for specific verticals (e.g., skilled trades, real estate) to capture long-tail LLM queries.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Process:** Requires a "mini-sprint" (3–4 weeks) to build new personas and calibrate the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [**Constraint:** growthx.ai needs a "container" (design/dev support) to execute interactive projects. Relay may provide this via a new retained brand agency.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [**Initiative 2: Programmatic SEO for Help Center**](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
      - [**Concept:** Expand the product-specific Help Center with programmatic content to boost LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The Help Center already drives significant LLM traffic. This initiative would create a large library of templated, specific answers that LLMs can easily pull.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
      - [**Next Step:** Dave will review the existing Help Center content to assess its structure and suitability for expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)

### Performance & Reporting

  - [**Metrics:** All key metrics are trending positively.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
      - [Impressions are up.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
      - [Content pillars show session growth.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
      - LLM visibility is improving (moved from \#3 to \#2).
  - [**LLM Traffic Volatility:** The week-to-week spikes are normal.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
      - [**Causes:** Small sample sizes (e.g., 50 sessions can skew percentages) and model updates.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
      - [**Trend:** Claude is emerging as a fast-growing traffic source, diversifying from the previous ChatGPT-only focus.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
  - [**December Reporting:** An incomplete report will be delivered by Dec 22 to accommodate the holiday break.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**growthx.ai:**](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
      - [Review and flag the two off-brief articles for rewrite.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
      - [Update writing guidelines and test new intro/closer styles.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
      - [Provide pricing for a +5 articles/week volume increase.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1241.0)
      - [Research the Ramp project to understand its constraints and success factors.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [Deliver the incomplete December report by Dec 22.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1390.0)
  - [**Relay:**](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
      - [Approve more topics in Airtable to build a content buffer for the holiday week.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
      - [Review Help Center content to assess its structure and suitability for programmatic expansion.](https://fathom.video/share/EhS_EDPr4cQyg36mZCf2pJSqsby_Udje?tab=summary&timestamp=1757.0)
